title: Metatranscriptomic analysis of lung and colon-faecal samples from bank voles (Clethrionomys glareolus)
author: Anton, Alina J.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This technical note provides an overview of a proof-of-concept metatranscriptomic study conducted within the EU-funded BEPREP project (EU grant agree-ment no. 101060568) to characterise the RNA virome of bank voles ( Clethrionomys glareolus ) from ecologically distinct sites in Sweden and Italy. It describes sample selection, RNA extraction, sequencing, bioinformatic processing, and viral contig annotation from lung and colon-faecal samples, with particular attention to the detection of  Puumala orthohantavirus -related sequences. 
 The technical document is named 20260530_metatrans_bv_BEPREP_R0.pdf. Associated raw data from the Illumina NextSeq 2000 sequencing run are named RNA_2025_013_FLI.tar. Details about the sequence raw data are provided in the technical note.
